description:
qimgv
=====
Qt5 image viewer. Fast, configurable, easy to use. Optional video support.

## Screenshots

Main window & panel        |  Folder view   |  Settings window  
:-------------------------:|:-------------------------:|:-------------------------:|
[![img1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/easymodo/qimgv/master/qimgv/distrib/screenshots/qimgv_1_thumb.jpg)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/easymodo/qimgv/master/qimgv/distrib/screenshots/qimgv_1.jpg?raw=true)  |  [![img2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/easymodo/qimgv/master/qimgv/distrib/screenshots/qimgv_2_thumb.jpg)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/easymodo/qimgv/master/qimgv/distrib/screenshots/qimgv_2.jpg?raw=true) | [![img3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/easymodo/qimgv/master/qimgv/distrib/screenshots/qimgv_3_thumb.jpg)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/easymodo/qimgv/master/qimgv/distrib/screenshots/qimgv_3.jpg?raw=true)

## [qimgv v0.6 video overview](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AODRGCRPCpw)

## Key features:

- Simple UI

- Fast

- Easy to use

- Fully configurable, including shortcuts

- Basic image editing: Crop, Rotate and Resize

- Ability to quickly copy / move images to different folders

- Experimental video playback via libmpv

- Ability to run shell scripts

- A nice dark theme, should look identical on every OS / DE
summary: Qt5 image viewer. Fast, configurable, easy to use. Optional video support.
author: easymodo
